Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json

with open\('D:/vibecording/showmoneyv2/workflow_SWING_patched_20260310.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    wf = json.load\(f\)

patched_count = 0
for node in wf.get\('nodes', []\):
    if node.get\('name'\) == 'Swing Scanner':
        code = node['parameters']['functionCode']

        # Patch 1: Naver 종목명 별도 저장 블록 추가
        old1 = "      if \(rows.length > 0\) {\\n        krxUniverseSource = 'naver';\\n        store.krxUniverseCache = {"
        new1 = \("      if \(rows.length > 0\) {\\n"
                "        krxUniverseSource = 'naver';\\n"
                "        // Naver 종목명을 별도 저장 \(KRX 인코딩 깨짐 방지용 — KRX가 캐시 덮어써도 보존\)\\n"
                "        if \(store.naverNamesDate !== today\) {\\n"
                "          const nm = {};\\n"
                "          for \(const nr of rows\) {\\n"
                "            const c = String\(nr.ISU_SRT_CD || ''\);\\n"
                "            const n = String\(nr.ISU_ABBRV || nr.ISU_NM || ''\).trim\(\);\\n"
                "            if \(c && n\) nm[c] = n;\\n"
                "          }\\n"
                "          store.naverNames = nm;\\n"
                "          store.naverNamesDate = today;\\n"
                "        }\\n"
                "        store.krxUniverseCache = {"\)
        code = code.replace\(old1, new1, 1\)

        # Patch 2: NAME 빌드 시 store.naverNames 우선 사용
        old2 = "    const nm = String\(row.ISU_ABBRV || row.ISU_NM || ''\).trim\(\);"
        new2 = "    const nm = \(store.naverNames && store.naverNames[rc]\) || String\(row.ISU_ABBRV || row.ISU_NM || ''\).trim\(\);"
        code = code.replace\(old2, new2, 1\)

        node['parameters']['functionCode'] = code
        patched_count += 1
        print\(f"Swing Scanner 패치 완료: len={len\(code\)}, naverNames={\('naverNames' in code\)}, naverNamesDate={\('naverNamesDate' in code\)}"\)

print\(f"총 {patched_count}개 노드 패치됨"\)

out = 'D:/vibecording/showmoneyv2/workflow_SWING_patched_20260312_encoding_fix.json'
with open\(out, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    json.dump\(wf, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)
print\(f"저장 완료: {out}"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json

with open\('D:/vibecording/showmoneyv2/workflow_SWING_patched_20260312_encoding_fix.json', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    d = json.load\(f\)
nodes = d.get\('nodes', []\)
swing = [n for n in nodes if 'swing scanner' in n.get\('name',''\).lower\(\)][0]
fix_code = swing.get\('parameters', {}\).get\('jsCode', swing.get\('parameters', {}\).get\('functionCode', ''\)\)

with open\('D:/vibecording/showmoneyv2/swing_scanner_code.js', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    curr_code = f.read\(\)

curr_lines = curr_code.split\('\\n'\)
fix_lines = fix_code.split\('\\n'\)

print\(f'Current lines: {len\(curr_lines\)}'\)
print\(f'Encoding_fix lines: {len\(fix_lines\)}'\)
print\(\)

diffs = []
max_check = min\(len\(curr_lines\), len\(fix_lines\)\)
for i in range\(max_check\):
    if curr_lines[i] != fix_lines[i]:
        diffs.append\(\(i+1, curr_lines[i], fix_lines[i]\)\)

print\(f'Total differing lines: {len\(diffs\)}'\)
print\(\)
print\('First 30 diffs:'\)
for ln, old, new in diffs[:30]:
    print\(f'L{ln}:'\)
    print\(f'  OLD: {old[:120]}'\)
    print\(f'  NEW: {new[:120]}'\)
    print\(\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json

# Check SWING_ONLY version for differences vs current
with open\('D:/vibecording/showmoneyv2/workflow_SWING_ONLY_20260312_encoding_fix.json', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    d = json.load\(f\)
nodes = d.get\('nodes', []\)
swing = [n for n in nodes if 'swing scanner' in n.get\('name',''\).lower\(\)][0]
fix_code = swing.get\('parameters', {}\).get\('jsCode', swing.get\('parameters', {}\).get\('functionCode', ''\)\)

fix_lines = fix_code.split\('\\n'\)

with open\('D:/vibecording/showmoneyv2/swing_scanner_code.js', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    curr_code = f.read\(\)
curr_lines = curr_code.split\('\\n'\)

print\(f'SWING_ONLY fix lines: {len\(fix_lines\)}, current: {len\(curr_lines\)}'\)

# Find name/ISU section in SWING_ONLY
print\(\)
print\("=== SWING_ONLY: Name resolution area ==="\)
for i, l in enumerate\(fix_lines\):
    if any\(k in l for k in ['naverNames', 'ISU_ABBRV', 'naverNamesDate', 'store.naverN']\):
        start = max\(0, i-1\)
        end = min\(len\(fix_lines\), i+2\)
        for j in range\(start, end\):
            try:
                print\(f'L{j+1}: {fix_lines[j]}'\)
            except:
                pass
        print\(\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json
from datetime import datetime

# Load base workflow
with open\('D:/vibecording/showmoneyv2/workflow_FINAL_20260312_232759.json', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    wf = json.load\(f\)

# Load new swing scanner code
with open\('D:/vibecording/showmoneyv2/swing_scanner_code.js', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    new_swing_code = f.read\(\)

# Verify fix is present
assert 'naver_string_parse_fix' in new_swing_code, "FIX NOT IN CODE!"
print\("✅ naver_string_parse_fix confirmed in swing_scanner_code.js"\)

# Count the fix occurrences \(should be 2\)
count = new_swing_code.count\("typeof resp === 'string'"\)
print\(f"✅ typeof resp === 'string' check: {count} occurrences \(expected 2\)"\)

# Check Korean is proper UTF-8
sample_korean = '실제 응답 샘플 캡처'
assert sample_korean in new_swing_code, "Korean sample text not found"
print\(f"✅ Korean text '{sample_korean}' found \(UTF-8 OK\)"\)

# Check isGarbled function
assert 'isGarbled' in new_swing_code
print\("✅ isGarbled\(\) function present"\)

# Check Naver names priority
assert 'naverNm || krxNm' in new_swing_code
print\("✅ Naver names priority \(naverNm || krxNm\) confirmed"\)

# Check Buffer.isBuffer utf8 handling
assert "Buffer.isBuffer\(raw\) ? raw.toString\('utf8'\)" in new_swing_code
print\("✅ Buffer.isBuffer → utf8 conversion confirmed"\)

# Patch swing scanner node
patched = 0
for n in wf.get\('nodes', []\):
    if n.get\('name'\) == 'Swing Scanner':
        n.setdefault\('parameters', {}\)['functionCode'] = new_swing_code
        patched += 1
        print\(f"✅ Swing Scanner node patched \({len\(new_swing_code\)} chars\)"\)

assert patched == 1, f"Expected 1 Swing Scanner node, found {patched}"

# Save new workflow JSON
ts = datetime.utcnow\(\).strftime\("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"\)
output_path = f'D:/vibecording/showmoneyv2/workflow_FINAL_{ts}_naver_fix.json'
with open\(output_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    json.dump\(wf, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)

print\(f"\\n✅ Saved: {output_path.split\('/'\)[-1]}"\)

# Verify round-trip
with open\(output_path, encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    verify = json.load\(f\)
for n in verify.get\('nodes', []\):
    if n.get\('name'\) == 'Swing Scanner':
        code = \(n.get\('parameters'\) or {}\).get\('functionCode', ''\)
        assert 'naver_string_parse_fix' in code
        assert sample_korean in code
        print\(f"✅ Round-trip verify OK \(code: {len\(code\)} chars\)"\)
EOF)
